ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of the package (e.g., Required, Suggested) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the package based on its dependencies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package and its functionality */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language of the package */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the package is deprecated */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was deprecated */,
  "alternative_packages" TEXT /* Alternative packages suggested for deprecated packages */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that has imports */,
  "imports_list" TEXT /* List of imports made by the package */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "import_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of import usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the import was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the import was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import method */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import record that uses the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the import method */,
  "method_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of method usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_methods_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class record */,
  "import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the import record that has class descriptions */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class imported from the parent package */,
  "class_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of class usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_classes_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("import_id") REFERENCES imports ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package which has dependencies */,
  "dependent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that is a dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "dependency_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of dependency usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was first created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suggested_packages" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package for which suggestions are made */,
  "suggested_package" TEXT /* Name of the suggested package */,
  "suggestion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suggestion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the suggestion was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the suggestion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suggested_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package for which heaviness is calculated */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Calculated heaviness score for the package */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of package usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was first calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_metrics_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the package version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is stable */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was released */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_packages" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary package */,
  "related_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related package */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., similar, alternative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_packages_related_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related package */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., feedback, bug report) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue reported in the comment is resolved */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
